title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Amazon India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Amazon India in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
